description: Runloop provides managed sandbox infrastructure for AI coding agents, including isolated Linux devboxes, blueprints, snapshots, storage objects, agent tooling, and benchmarking/evaluation features. It is used to run code, manage files and environments, and coordinate agent workflows on hosted infrastructure.
summary: Runloop exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API at https://api.runloop.ai, a Node-based CLI (`rli`) authenticated by `RUNLOOP_API_KEY`, and documentation referencing an MCP server for AI tools whose connection/auth details are not publicly specified.
